lifeAreas.title: Life Areas
lifeAreas.description: Define and manage the key dimensions of your life.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose a light theme inspired by sky, clouds, and sunrise tones.
appearance.themeHint: Theme changes apply immediately and are saved to your profile.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
language.label: Interface language

gender.title: Grammatical form
gender.description: Choose the grammatical gender used in the interface (affects verb and adjective forms in Polish).
gender.label: Grammatical form
gender.hint: Affects verb and adjective forms in the Polish interface.

psychologicalProfile.title: Psychological Profile
psychologicalProfile.shortDescription: An AI-built summary of patterns, strengths and growth edges — built from your own data.
psychologicalProfile.description: Run a new build whenever you want an updated portrait. Past versions are kept so you can see how your understanding of yourself evolves.
psychologicalProfile.wizardComingSoon: Profile building wizard is coming in a follow-up story.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this profile version?
deleteDialog.message: This version will be permanently removed. Older versions and the current version are not affected.

emptyState.title: Build your first profile
emptyState.body: Pick which data to include, let the AI build a first draft, and review it before saving.

sections.empty: No observations in the selected data.

wizard.title: Build psychological profile
wizard.generationComingSoon: Generation arrives in the next story.

dataTypes.title: What to include
dataTypes.help: Pick which kinds of data the AI should draw on. Leave out anything that doesn't feel relevant.

emotionLogs.title: Emotion logs
emotionLogs.help: Emotions you've tracked with short notes.

exerciseSessions.title: Exercise sessions
exerciseSessions.help: CBT, IFS, logotherapy and self-discovery exercises you've completed.

preview.title: Preview scope
preview.subtitle: Quick look at what the AI would see.
preview.tokenWarning: Heads up: the selected scope is quite large. Generation may be slow or truncated.
preview.emptyState: No data in this scope. Adjust the filters or pick a wider range.

generate.inFlightHint: This usually takes 15–45 seconds. You can stay on this screen — we'll take you to the draft as soon as it's ready.

missingApiKey.title: OpenAI API key required
missingApiKey.help: Profile generation runs on your own OpenAI account. Add your API key in AI Settings and come back here — your scope selections will be kept.

review.subtitle: Edit any section that does not feel right. Changes stay in this draft until you save.
review.emptySection: No observations in the selected data.
review.unsavedNote: You have unsaved edits. They will be included when you save.
review.extrasHelp: The model produced text outside the expected sections.

regenDialog.title: Regenerate profile?
regenDialog.message: Your manual edits will be replaced by a fresh AI response. This cannot be undone.

backDialog.title: Discard unsaved edits?
backDialog.message: Going back will keep your scope but your edits will be discarded after a re-generate.

save.comingSoon: The save step is coming in the next story.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.description: Connect your own OpenAI API key so the assistant can respond to your journal chats. Your key stays on this device and is never shared.
aiSettings.apiKeyHint: Your API key is stored locally in your browser. Get a key from
aiSettings.saveFailed: Failed to save API key. Please try again.
